positive: A highly detailed, stylized forest scene featuring silhouettes of glowing bioluminescent flora and graceful woodland spirits. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, with strong contrast between the dark forest background and the vibrant, glowing cyan, sapphire, and neon green elements. Focus on clean, defined outlines and abstract elements suitable for a seamless repeating pattern on apparel. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with modern vaporwave neon aesthetics, rendered as a two-tone vector graphic with subtle gradient overlays. Dramatic cinematic lighting emphasizes the glow, giving it an ethereal, magical feel. Central subject: a stylized pathway leading into the glowing depths.
